title: Home
description: Prototype FastyGo applications from prompts, specs, previews, and generated source.

hero.title: What do you want to build?
hero.subtitle: Describe your idea in natural language. BuildY will plan, model, and generate a FastyGo application prototype on mock fixtures.
hero.prompt_placeholder: Describe an app, landing page, CRM, CMS, portal...
hero.helper_text: BuildY turns plain-language intent into a structured plan, CMS model, preview, and source snapshot.

prompt_suggestions.label: Create SaaS landing with CMS content

tool_cards.title: Prompt Plan
tool_cards.description: Turn your request into a structured application plan.

tool_cards.title: CMS Model
tool_cards.description: Define content types, fields, relations, and validation.

tool_cards.title: Preview
tool_cards.description: Open a live mock preview of your application.

tool_cards.title: Source
tool_cards.description: Read-only generated source for code, config, and schema.

tool_cards.title: Diff Review
tool_cards.description: Review changes in code, content, and schema.

tool_cards.title: Export
tool_cards.description: Export source snapshot or open repository mock.

showcase.title: Explore powerful starting points
showcase.description: Use any of these mock applications as a starting point for your workspace.

items.name: AppCMS
items.description: Content websites, pages, media, and taxonomies.

items.name: AppSuite
items.description: Suite launcher, workspace switcher, and product hub.

items.name: Director
items.description: Operations dashboard, approvals, and status center.

items.name: Contentor
items.description: Editorial workspace, planning and publishing flow.

items.name: Webmaster
items.description: SEO, site health, redirects, and analytics-ready pages.

notice.title: You're in Prototype Mode
notice.description: Everything here is powered by mock fixtures. No external services, no real repos, no billing. Perfect for exploring and building ideas.

aria.composer_label: Describe what you want BuildY to create
aria.attachment_label: Attach a reference for the prompt
aria.assistant_label: Ask AI to refine the prompt
